name: Manor Echoes
descriptionTemplate: Gain 1 Arithmetica and temporarily reduce all enemies' {STR⯆} by [Exhaustion:Arg1] for 1 turn. If "Xu" is in the team, inflict 1 stack of {Spellbound} on all enemies.
lore:
The secluded manor holds too many secrets—of power, of obsession, of desire.
Of the glimpse the evil deity casts upon the mortal world, brimming with love both "delighted" and "twisted."
